title: ledonia peduncularis var. salviifolia
intro: Ledonia peduncularis var. salviifolia, also known as the mountain ledonia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ledonia peduncularis var. salviifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
